failure_modes.cause: Product crystallization in narrow 0.75mm ID tubing during cooling or at low solubility points
failure_modes.mitigation: Install inline filter upstream and heated collection vessel to prevent back-crystallization

failure_modes.cause: Seal failure or connection leak at 150°C releasing reproductive toxin vapors
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement continuous vapor monitoring and emergency ventilation shutdown interlock

failure_modes.mode: Pump failure at ultra-low flow rate
failure_modes.cause: HPLC pump instability at 0.066 mL/min causing flow oscillations and residence time deviation
failure_modes.mitigation: Use syringe pump designed for microfluidics or add pulse dampener with flow verification

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow and creates overpressure risk
validation_experiments: Run product-forming reaction for 3× residence time (879 min) monitoring for pressure rise >10% indicating blockage onset
Leak test all connections at 150°C with helium detection to verify <1 ppm DMF vapor release
Characterize pump flow stability at 0.066 mL/min over 8 hours measuring CV% of residence time distribution
